'''havate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:plaguily|plaguily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plaguily|plaguily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| havate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:havate|havate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:havatesher|havatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:havatesherĂ«m|havatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:havatero|havatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:havateshĂ«|havateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:havateshĂ«m|havateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihavatero|gokihavatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihavateshĂ«|gokihavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihavateshĂ«m|gokihavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohavankerom|gohavankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohavankeshĂ«|gohavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohavankeshĂ«m|gohavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohavankeya|gohavankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:havaterom|havaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:havatemu|havatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:havateya|havateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihavaterom|gokihavaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihavatemu|gokihavatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihavateya|gokihavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:havavate|havavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:havavatesher|havavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:havavatesherĂ«m|havavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:havavatero|havavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:havavateshĂ«|havavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:havavateshĂ«m|havavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihavavatero|gokihavavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihavavateshĂ«|gokihavavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihavavateshĂ«m|gokihavavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohavavankerom|gohavavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohavavankeshĂ«|gohavavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohavavankeshĂ«m|gohavavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohavavankeya|gohavavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:havavaterom|havavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:havavatemu|havavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:havavateya|havavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihavavaterom|gokihavavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihavavatemu|gokihavavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihavavateya|gokihavavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠvĂŠte|hĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠvĂŠtesher|hĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠvĂŠtero|hĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠvĂŠtero|gokihĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠvĂŠterom|hĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠvĂŠtemu|hĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠvĂŠteya|hĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠvĂŠterom|gokihĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠvĂŠteya|gokihĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafvafte|hafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafvaftesher|hafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafvaftesherĂ«m|hafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafvaftero|hafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafvafteshĂ«|hafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafvafteshĂ«m|hafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafvaftero|gokihafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafvafteshĂ«|gokihafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafvafteshĂ«m|gokihafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafvafnkerom|gohafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafvafnkeshĂ«|gohafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafvafnkeshĂ«m|gohafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafvafnkeya|gohafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafvafterom|hafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafvaftemu|hafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafvafteya|hafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafvafterom|gokihafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafvaftemu|gokihafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafvafteya|gokihafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
